ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "code" TEXT /* Abbreviated code for the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region of the country */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP of the country */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date for the country data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "parent_sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent sector (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sectors_parent_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_consumption" (
  "consumption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy consumption entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of energy consumption */,
  "consumption_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of energy consumption in the sector */,
  "total_consumption" REAL /* Total energy consumption in absolute terms */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for total consumption */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Reliability of the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date for the energy consumption data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consumption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for contact */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role and its responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  "granted" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the permission is granted for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)
